title: Proxmox VE API Capability Pack Skill
copyText:
Install:
curl -L https://heyclau.de/downloads/skills/proxmox-ve-api-capability-pack.zip -o proxmox-ve-api-capability-pack.zip && unzip -o proxmox-ve-api-capability-pack.zip -d ./proxmox-ve-api-capability-pack

Usage:
Use this skill when an agent must automate Proxmox tasks with cluster-safe sequencing and production-grade verification.

Asset:
# Trigger
"Use the Proxmox VE API capability pack skill for this infrastructure operation."

# Required output
1) Endpoint and task-state mapping
2) Pre-flight and capacity checks
3) Operation sequence with stop conditions
4) Post-flight validation and rollback guidance
